title: Build offline-first apps that sync in 2026
meta_description: Cut sync time 84% and battery drain 74% with offline-first apps — the intent-store pattern, SQLite WAL, and WorkManager constraints that actually work in unreliable markets 2026.
prewritten_tweet:
Teams think offline-first means "cache and retry."

In Nigeria and Kenya it means: store every intent locally, sync in 50 ms batches…

https://kubaik.github.io/build-offline-first-apps-that-sync-in-2026

#FutureTech #MobileDev #OfflineFirstApps #OfflineFirstMobile

Hot take: most people skip the measurement step. Agree?
